notes.title: P2 — onboarding flow — July 10
notes.content: User could not find the Add Task button. Spent 90 seconds looking in the sidebar. Eventually found it via the keyboard shortcut tooltip. Said: 'Why is this not more obvious?'

notes.title: NPS R012 — search critique
notes.content: The search function is terrible. I cannot find tasks from 3 months ago without scrolling through everything.

notes.title: Interview T3 — switching motivation
notes.content: We switched from Asana because the recurring tasks feature was the only thing we actually needed. Asana had it buried 4 clicks deep.

notes.title: NPS R005 — recurring tasks delight
notes.content: Best project tool I have used in 10 years. The recurring tasks feature saved us probably 2 hours per week.

notes.title: Interview T7 — collaboration friction
notes.content: About half my team still uses a spreadsheet. They resist the tool because the onboarding is too long and they don't see the value quickly enough.
